title: Analytical Study on Consumer Social and Behavioral Psychology and Its Influence on Online Purchasing
publisher: CRC Press — Internet of Behaviors (IoB) Book Chapter
summary: Pan-India survey of 1,438 consumers mapping how social media platform usage, time online, and age group influence online purchasing decisions. Applies the Internet of Behaviors (IoB) framework to uncover commercial behavioral signals across three demographic cohorts.
findings: Adults (20–40) drove 72.36% of all orders. Instagram led platform influence at 75% average. Prolonged social media use directly scales purchase intent — >2 hours = 45.08% buy-influenced vs 38.53% for <1 hour. November (Diwali) = 13.64% of annual orders.
